title: Beefy's Survival Utilities
description: A few nice utilities made by BeefyAndTheDucks.
body:
This mod is a collection of utilities designed for Survival mode made by BeefyAndTheDucks.

Usage:
  - Hold shift while mining a log to mine the entire tree.
    If you have a stick in your offhand, It will also include the leaves on the tree, and trees connected to the leaves.
